/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m0 -mthumb -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Og -g3  -mcpu=cortex-m0 -mthumb -T"/home/mattshaw/5780_Matthew_Shaw/mic_test/STM32F072XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -nostartfiles -Wl,-Map=mic_led_meter.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage CMakeFiles/mic_led_meter.dir/Src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/mic_led_meter.dir/Src/board.c.obj CMakeFiles/mic_led_meter.dir/Src/adc_mic.c.obj CMakeFiles/mic_led_meter.dir/Src/stm32f0xx_it.c.obj CMakeFiles/mic_led_meter.dir/Src/runtime_stubs.c.obj CMakeFiles/mic_led_meter.dir/system_stm32f0xx.c.obj CMakeFiles/mic_led_meter.dir/startup_stm32f072xb.s.obj -o mic_led_meter.elf  -lm
